## Verification

- [ ] `bun run verify`
- [ ] `bun run test:hyper-dank`, when shared package boundaries are touched
- [ ] Screenshot or Pa11y evidence reviewed for user-facing UI changes

## Review Notes

- [ ] The PR targets the accepted base branch: `main` for epic planning, the `feat/sheet-*` epic branch for tickets, or `main` for final epic acceptance.
- [ ] The PR links the matching GitHub Issue with `Closes`, `Fixes`, or `Refs`.
- [ ] The GitHub Project status reflects the current review state.
- [ ] The PR title follows Conventional Commits, for example `docs(sheet): add workflow templates`.
- [ ] Source changes update affected README, architecture, ticket, workflow, or operations docs.
- [ ] User-facing UI changes include screenshot evidence or a clear blocker note.
- [ ] Local SQLite databases, generated assets, and routine verification screenshots are not committed.
